name_en: Model: M47132. The Alma backpack makes a striking appearance at the 2024 Spring/Summer Women's show, adding a fashionable new piece to the Alma collection. Classic Monogram canvas paired with various Alma handbag elements, including rounded top handles, dazzling engraved lock, and key pouch. Removable shoulder strap offers versatile carrying options. 15.0 x 20.0 x 10.0 cm (L x H x W)
